subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! I am in the land of Egypt, and night and day am I occupied with the remembrance of the friends in the general peace assembly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امین عبدالبهاء در اقلیم مصرم و شب و روز بذکر یاران مشغول از مجمع صلح عمومی
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @suffering and imprisonment, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
